case_title: EVERYDAY MAGIC, INC. VS HERNANDEZ, MARCELA ESPINO

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARCELA ESPINO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,110.00 FILED BY EVERYDAY MAGIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARCELA ESPINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
